channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Introduction to Markdown (MD) Format What is Markdown? Markdown is a lightweight markup language with plain-text formatting syntax. It is designed to be easy to read and write, while also converting to HTML for presentation on the web. Markdown is widely used for formatting text on platforms such as GitHub, Reddit, Stack Overflow, and many more. Why Markdown? Markdown offers several advantages: Simplicity: Markdown syntax is straightforward and easy to learn.
